notes: Maps all 337 RetroAchievements (raGameId 810 main set + Oak subset 24140, from the achievements dataset / ra-set sources) to their dedicated checklist rows: main -> RetroAchievements checklist (slot 7, pokemon-crystal:ra:a<id>, src-ra), Oak -> Oak Catch List (slot 8, pokemon-crystal:oak-<chapter>:a<id>, src-ra-oak).

Target philosophy chosen by Pierre 2026-06-18: every achievement targets its own checklist row, so the RetroAchievements and Oak Catch List widgets are fully RA-synced. Gameplay steps keep their forward achievementRefs for inline badge display (set during the spine pass); the reverse sync link goes to the checklists.
0 unmapped, 0 flagged: every achievement has a 1:1 checklist row. raGameId 810 matches the library entry. The RA API is never called; the achievement list comes from the on-file ra-set sources.
